findings.title: System credibility is still low
findings.detail: Trust readiness is 40% against an 80% target. The app is still in evidence-building mode, not proven mode.
findings.action: Improve proof before adding more aggression: keep archiving odds, keep grading forward bets, and stay conservative on markets without late team-news clarity.
findings.prompt: Review the trust-readiness blockers and tighten whichever factor is hurting the score most right now without making the model more reckless.

findings.title: Latest collector run is not fully clean
findings.detail: The latest collector status is running. Partial or failed syncs can poison confidence and stale the pre-match view.
findings.action: Inspect the latest sync errors first and stabilize data freshness before changing the model logic.
findings.prompt: Inspect the latest collector summary, identify the failing provider or rate-limit issue, and make the data pipeline more robust without reducing coverage.

findings.title: Historical odds coverage is still too thin
findings.detail: Only 0 of the last 120 finished matches have archived bookmaker prices.
findings.action: Improve odds matching and pre-kickoff snapshot depth. Without historical prices, the betting layer cannot be trained honestly.
findings.prompt: Audit why finished matches are missing odds snapshots and improve the odds-matching or snapshot strategy so more historical bets become trainable.

findings.title: Probability calibration is still loose
findings.detail: Average Brier score across supported markets is about 0.2436. The probabilities still read less sharply than they should.
findings.action: Calibrate output probabilities and reduce confidence inflation in unstable bands.
findings.prompt: Audit the blind calibration buckets and tighten the most overconfident probability bands without flattening the entire model.

findings.title: Historical lineup archive is incomplete
findings.detail: Only 16 of the last 456 finished matches have stored confirmed lineups.
findings.action: Keep backfilling finished fixtures and improve source coverage for missing lineup rows.
findings.prompt: Audit which finished competitions or teams still lack archived lineups and improve the historical lineup backfill coverage.

findings.title: Forward graded bet sample is still small
findings.detail: Only 0 settled forward bets are graded in the live dashboard.
findings.action: Keep collecting and grading. Do not overreact to short-term ROI noise yet.
findings.prompt: Review the forward recommendation history and improve the grading dashboard or evidence tracking rather than forcing more bets.

findings.title: Separate decision policies are not promoted yet
findings.detail: The market-specific decision layer still has not earned promotion, which means 1X2, totals, and BTTS are still relying on conservative defaults.
findings.action: Increase priced historical evidence and refine the policy trainer before trying to promote a market layer.
findings.prompt: Inspect the decision-policy training blockers and improve the priced historical sample so market-specific policies can be trained honestly.

prompts: Review the trust-readiness blockers and tighten whichever factor is hurting the score most right now without making the model more reckless.
Inspect the latest collector summary, identify the failing provider or rate-limit issue, and make the data pipeline more robust without reducing coverage.
Audit why finished matches are missing odds snapshots and improve the odds-matching or snapshot strategy so more historical bets become trainable.
Audit the blind calibration buckets and tighten the most overconfident probability bands without flattening the entire model.
Audit which finished competitions or teams still lack archived lineups and improve the historical lineup backfill coverage.

blockers: Odds are only attached to 13 of 16 upcoming matches.
Expected lineups are only Likely or Confirmed on 0 of 16 upcoming matches.
Only 0 settled forward bets are graded so far.
Calibration is still loose with an average Brier score around 0.244.
The separate trained market decision layer has not earned promotion yet.
nextSteps: Keep the collector and reminder jobs running so more pre-kickoff odds snapshots are saved.
Wait for the final pre-kickoff refresh window. Trust should only rise when matches move to Likely or Confirmed lineups.
Let the app build a bigger graded sample before trusting small ROI swings.
Keep archiving results and prices so calibration can tighten over the next training cycles.
More settled priced samples are needed before the app can promote trained 1X2, totals, and BTTS decision rules.

blindSummary.warning: Blind sample uses only data and odds snapshots available before kickoff. It is still limited by missing historical odds coverage.
